entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum(L.) R. Br., the crop studied for seed maturity effects

entities.name: GERMINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of seeds to germinate, affected by seed maturity

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: The strength and health of the seedling during early growth, affected by seed maturity

entities.name: SEED MATURITY
entities.description: The developmental stage of the seeds at the time of harvest

entities.name: FRESH WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of seeds including moisture, which varies with maturity

entities.name: DRY-MATTER ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of increasing dry weight in the grain over time

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of water in the seeds at a specific maturity stage

entities.name: GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The proportion of seeds that successfully germinate

entities.name: DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of seeds after water removal, which coincides with maximum seedling vigor

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of storing seeds for long-term preservation
